name: TerraMind
task_tags: semantic segmentation; land-cover mapping; crop-type mapping; change detection; flood mapping; burn-scar mapping; water-body mapping; zero-shot classification; captioning
downstream_tasks: 9 PANGAEA benchmark tasks: wildfire burn-scar segmentation, marine debris/oil-spill segmentation, agricultural parcel/crop segmentation, flood/water-body segmentation, urban land-cover segmentation, DynamicEarthNet land-cover segmentation, crop-type mapping in South Sudan, SpaceNet7 building/change detection, AI4SmallFarms agricultural segmentation. Also reports zero-shot / generative tasks: land-use segmentation, water-body mapping, vegetation mapping, geolocation, captioning, text-to-image, and modality-to-modality generation.
openness_text: Open source: model weights, code, and pretraining dataset reported as open/permissive.
training_scale: Pretrained on >500B tokens; TerraMesh dataset around 9M samples. Large/base variants reported; training used large-scale GPU/HPC setup.
notes: One of the strongest current EO FMs because it is multimodal, generative, benchmarked, and open.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: Copernicus-FM
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; multi-label classification; change detection; flood mapping; regression / estimation
downstream_tasks: 15 Copernicus-Bench hierarchical tasks: Cloud-S2 segmentation, Cloud-S3 segmentation, EuroSAT-S1 classification, EuroSAT-S2 classification, BigEarthNet-S1 classification, BigEarthNet-S2 classification, LC100Cls-S3 classification, DFC2020-S1 segmentation, DFC2020-S2 segmentation, LC100Seg-S3 segmentation, Flood-S1 change detection, LCZ-S2 classification, Biomass-S3 regression, AQ-NO2-S5P regression, AQ-O3-S5P regression.
openness_text: Open source: paper reports code, datasets, and model release.
training_scale: Copernicus-Pretrain: 18.7M aligned images, about 920B pixels; joint subset around 220K geospatial grids used in reported ViT-Base pretraining.
notes: Broadest Sentinel-specific FM row; includes atmosphere as well as surface tasks.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: AnySat
task_tags: semantic segmentation; land-cover mapping; scene classification; crop-type mapping; change detection; flood mapping; burn-scar mapping
downstream_tasks: Reported/evaluated tasks include land-cover mapping, tree-species identification, crop-type classification, change detection/deforestation detection, climate-type classification, flood mapping, burn-scar mapping, and segmentation over datasets such as TreeSatAI-TS, PASTIS-HD, FLAIR, PLANTED, BraDD-S1TS, SICKLE, TimeSen2Crop, and Sen1Flood11.
openness_text: Open source: code and checkpoints available.
training_scale: Trained on GeoPlex: 5 multimodal datasets and 11 sensors. Public sources reviewed do not report a single token count comparable to TerraMind.
notes: Strong multimodal representation model; less generative than TerraMind.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: DOFA
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; multi-label classification; object detection; change detection
downstream_tasks: Evaluated on remote-sensing classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and change-detection style benchmarks. Representative datasets include GEO-Bench tasks and common RS tasks such as EuroSAT, BigEarthNet, RESISC45, DOTA/DIOR-style detection, land-cover segmentation, and change detection depending on experiment.
openness_text: Open source: code and weights reported.
training_scale: Paper reports continual / hybrid pretraining across five EO modalities. Exact universal token count is not reported in the public abstract/source reviewed.
notes: Important architecture family because later Copernicus-FM extends DOFA.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: DOFA+
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; multi-label classification; crop-type mapping; object detection; change detection; flood mapping; burn-scar mapping; water-body mapping
downstream_tasks: 22 datasets across 4 task families: image classification, semantic segmentation, object detection, and change detection. Named examples: m-BigEarthNet, m-ForestNet, m-Brick-Kiln, m-PV4GER, m-So2Sat, m-EuroSAT; segmentation tasks such as PV4GER-seg, NZ cattle, NeonTree, cashew plantation, South Africa crop type, Chesapeake land-cover; PANGAEA tasks such as burn scars, MADOS marine debris/oil spills, PASTIS, Sen1Floods11, DynamicEarthNet, crop-type mapping, SpaceNet7, AI4SmallFarms; plus RESISC45.
openness_text: Open source / partial: model/code availability reported for DOFA family, but check exact DOFA+ checkpoint license before redistribution.
training_scale: DOFA+ reports strong EO adaptation after about 410K EO image tiles; no universal token count reported.
notes: Good row to separate from DOFA because the training strategy and evaluation scale differ.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: Galileo
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; crop-type mapping; flood mapping
downstream_tasks: 11 benchmarks across multiple tasks; representative tasks include crop mapping, flood detection, land-cover/land-use classification, segmentation, and multimodal transfer under missing-modality settings.
openness_text: Open source: code released under MIT in public repo.
training_scale: Public abstract/source reviewed does not report a single token count. Uses global multimodal pretraining over space-time EO inputs.
notes: A generalist multimodal EO model; exact modality/task breakdown should be checked from the full paper for final publication table.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: Prithvi-EO-1.0
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; crop-type mapping; flood mapping; burn-scar mapping
downstream_tasks: Representative tasks: flood mapping, wildfire burn scar mapping, land-cover classification, crop classification/segmentation, and other HLS-based EO downstream tasks.
openness_text: Open source: weights and code released by NASA/IBM on Hugging Face/GitHub.
training_scale: Pretrained on large HLS time-series corpus. Commonly reported model size: 100M parameters; token count not reported in the same way as TerraMind.
notes: Narrower than multimodal models but a major first-generation open EO FM.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: Prithvi-EO-2.0
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; crop-type mapping; flood mapping; burn-scar mapping; regression / estimation; time-series analysis
downstream_tasks: 7 named downstream tasks/datasets: Sen1Floods11 flood detection, wildfire scar detection, burn scar intensity, Landslide4Sense landslide detection, US multi-temporal crop segmentation, European multi-temporal land-cover/crop classification, BioMassters above-ground biomass estimation.
openness_text: Open source: model weights and GitHub code available.
training_scale: 4.2M global time-series samples, 45,568 validation samples, >7 years of HLS imagery; 300M and 600M parameter models.
notes: Major upgraded Prithvi row; more robust global training than EO-1.0.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: TESSERA
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; crop-type mapping; regression / estimation
downstream_tasks: Six representative benchmarks: TreeSatAI-TS tree species classification, PASTIS-R parcel segmentation, Austrian Crop classification, BioMassters above-ground biomass regression, Borneo canopy-height regression, Austrian Crop semantic segmentation. General use includes land-cover, crop, biomass, canopy, and environmental monitoring.
openness_text: Open source: model weights, code, and embeddings/datasets reported as available.
training_scale: Produces global annual 10 m embeddings, 128-D latent representation, int8 embedding products; trained over petabyte-scale Sentinel data. Exact token count not reported in reviewed source.
notes: Very relevant because it supplies analysis-ready global embeddings, not only a model checkpoint.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: AlphaEarth Foundations
task_tags: land-cover mapping; scene classification; crop-type mapping; change detection; regression / estimation
downstream_tasks: Evaluated/advertised for classification, regression, change detection, similarity search, land-use/land-cover mapping, ecosystem/habitat mapping, agriculture/crop mapping, and surface property estimation.
openness_text: Partial / closed: embeddings available through Google Earth Engine; full training code/weights not fully open in the same way as TerraMind/Prithvi.
training_scale: Trained on petabytes of EO data; released as annual 64-band/64-D embedding fields from 2017 onward at roughly 10 m grid scale; about 16x smaller storage than some alternatives.
notes: Very strong as an embedding product; less open as a retrainable model.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: Clay v1.5
task_tags: land-cover mapping; scene classification; crop-type mapping; change detection; flood mapping; burn-scar mapping; regression / estimation
downstream_tasks: Embeddings/fine-tuning for classification, regression, generative tasks, crop and land-cover mapping, above-ground biomass/productivity, change detection, deforestation, wildfire, flood, destruction/urban development monitoring.
openness_text: Open source: Apache-2.0-style code/weights model resources reported.
training_scale: About 70M globally sampled image chips; roughly 6,400 H100 GPU-hours reported for training. Token count not reported in TerraMind-style units.
notes: One of the most practically accessible open geospatial FMs.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.

name: SatMAE
task_tags: semantic segmentation; scene classification; multi-label classification
downstream_tasks: Scene classification, land-cover classification, semantic segmentation, and transfer to datasets such as EuroSAT, fMoW-Sentinel, BigEarthNet-style classification, and segmentation datasets.
openness_text: Open source / partial: code and some pretrained weights available in public repos.
training_scale: Training uses large RS image corpora such as fMoW-Sentinel/fMoW-RGB depending on variant; exact token count not consistently reported in public summaries.
notes: Foundational MAE baseline for many later EO FMs.
source_provenance: Curated workbook seed; paper/code/weights links cross-checked against Awesome Remote Sensing Foundation Models where available.
